GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-admins
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Landing Zone Prod environment OKE platform cluster management administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.description: Landing Zone Prod environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.description: Landing Zone Prod environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC viewer access group.

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-admins
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Grants grp-lz-prod-oke-admins OKE platform administration access in the Prod environment OKE platform and network compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage cluster-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage instance-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to inspect compartments in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use subnets in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage private-ips in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-rbac-roles
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.description: Grants OKE RBAC administrator and viewer groups Kubernetes cluster access in the Prod environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin' to use cluster in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer' to use cluster in compartment cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-VCN-CNI-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-vcn-cni
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-VCN-CNI-KEY.description: Unsafe: grants OKE clusters tenancy-wide VCN CNI permissions for instance, private IP, and network security group resources.
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-VCN-CNI-KEY.//: This is potentially unsafe as it can be used for privilege escalation across environments. See https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/ContEng/Concepts/contengpodnetworking_topic-OCI_CNI_plugin.htm for restricting permissions.
statements: allow any-user to manage instances in tenancy where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster'}
allow any-user to use private-ips in tenancy where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster'}
allow any-user to use network-security-groups in tenancy where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster'}
